mainText:
Promo: Bank of Entitlement - Where Your Every Whim Becomes Reality! 

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, get this-I strolled into my morning meeting at Bank of Entitlement, sporting my new solid gold watch that I purchased with the bank's "CEO Discount Card," naturally. As I'm sipping my imported organic chai latte, one of my employees had the audacity to suggest we reduce costs by downgrading the office snacks from caviar to lobster rolls. Lobster rolls! Can you believe the nerve? Well, I shut that down faster than you can say "entitlement," reminding them that the cornerstone of our company culture is luxury at all costs. But it didn't end there. Oh no. In a fit of desperation, they tried to argue their case further, claiming we needed to be more fiscally responsible. Fiscally responsible? I nearly choked on my truffle-infused croissant. I promptly fired them on the spot, declaring that anyone who dared question the lavish lifestyle we uphold at Bank of Entitlement simply did not belong. And you know what? I still sleep like a baby at night, knowing I've preserved the sanctity of opulence and excess in the corporate world. Ah, the sweet taste of entitlement!
